content.en:
The aura of a Dao Ancestor locked on Ye Tian, and this time Ye Tian undoubtedly provoked the anger of the public.

For the Dao Ancestors, this is an opportunity for them to compete for, and those True Ancestors would be good to pick up a few Forbidden Dao Stones, how dare they compete with them for the Forbidden Dao Stones?

They paid a huge price and forcibly came here against the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, just to fight for the Forbidden Dao Stone, and whoever fought with them was the enemy.

And Ye Tian, the true ancestor, dared to snatch it, not only to enemies, but also to provoke them.

"What if you don't pay it?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Suddenly, the audience was dumbfounded.

Many True Ancestors were shocked, and they all felt that Ye Tian was too bold to dare to provoke the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, even if the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor couldn't exert his strength, it was very simple to pinch an invincible True Ancestor to death!

"Nine Extremes General, quickly throw the Forbidden Dao Stone out!"

The bloody general also came here, and hurriedly sent a voice to remind.

He didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to compete with a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, once he angered the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, the consequences would be unimaginable!

Moreover, there is more than one Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor here, once all of them are aimed at Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian has many life-saving things, I am afraid that he will not be able to live.

"Die!"

Gu Feng Dao Ancestor made a move.

And the other Dao Ancestors didn't stop this time, after all, even if the Gu Feng Dao Ancestor killed Ye Tian, as long as he didn't snatch the Forbidden Dao Stone, it didn't matter.

But if the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor wanted to snatch the Forbidden Dao Stone, they would really stop it.

"Daojutsu: Breaking the Wind!"

Rumble!

Winds blew in the void, and mountain peaks turned into nothingness under these winds.

This is a Dao technique, not an ordinary wind, it contains a terrifying corrosive effect, and the ordinary invincible Dao Ancestor will be directly melted away if he is hit by the Wind Breaking Dao Technique.

Moreover, it was difficult to dodge the Dao Technique Breaking Wind, covering a large area, and some True Ancestors were relatively close, so they did not dodge, they were directly shrouded by the Breaking Wind, and instantly turned into nothingness.

However, after Ye Tian cast the Great Wilderness Law Body, the Dao Technique Breaking Wind did not help him.

"How is it possible!" Gu Feng Dao Ancestor was shocked, "I am a great thousand Dao technique, how can you resist it?"

Not only did the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor dare not believe it, but the other Dao Ancestors were also surprised.

They all knew the strength of the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor, and when they used their Dao skills to break through the wind, the invincible True Ancestor couldn't resist it at all, and they could only rely on life-saving things to survive.

But Ye Tian didn't use the life-saving thing, but stubbornly assessed a defensive Dao technique to resist.

"The strength of the Nine Extremes General ......"

The Bloody General, the Ferris General, and the Wind Star General were all shocked.

They thought that they would not be able to resist the Wind Breaking Dao Technique of the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor, and once they were hit, they would be severely injured if they were not dead, and they did not have the slightest ability to resist.

Then.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said: "Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor, this is your strength? This bit of wind tickles me almost the same, if you want to kill me, you probably think too much!"

Ye Tian walked step by step, ignoring the Wind Breaking Dao Technique.

The Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor was furious and performed another Dao Technique-Hurricane Technique!

Rumble!!!!

The tornado swept through the heavens and the earth, and the terrifying rules enveloped all around, crushing everything, and everything that was caught up in the hurricane spell would be shattered.

The hurricane technique is one of the famous Daqian techniques in the Hurricane Mountain, and it is famous in the vast sea area.

In terms of power, the Hurricane Technique is several times stronger than the Wind Breaking Dao Technique, and the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor's attainments in the Hurricane Technique are also quite profound, and he has cultivated to the realm of Xiaocheng.

The Great Thousand Dao Technique of the Xiaocheng Realm was so terrifying, and it was performed by the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor, even the top Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor did not dare to take his hurricane technique hard.

"It seems that the strength must be exposed!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But for the sake of nearly 10,000 forbidden Dao stones, he felt that he needed to expose his strength, and this price was worth paying.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's aura erupted violently, no longer hiding his strength.

"Xiao Cheng Forbidden Body!"

"Consummate the Great Wilderness Law Body!"

......

At the same time, Ye Tian's True Ancestor's extreme True Ancestor's power and physical strength also burst out, and it didn't look like a True Ancestor.

I saw Ye Tianshi display the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear of the Consummation Realm, and even held the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear, and struck away with a terrifying physical force, fighting with the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor in close quarters.

Tear and pull!

The Hurricane Technique was forcibly torn apart by Ye Tian, and the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear with the power of the Dark Forbidden Weapon bombarded a piece of Dao weapon armor on the Gu Feng Dao Ancestor's body.

Boom!

The Dao weapon armor cracked, and the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor was also knocked out by Ye Tianyi.

At this moment, no one in the sky and on the earth was shocked, and no one was shocked.

Invincible True Ancestors, such as the Blood Demon General, the Ferris General, the Purple Red True Ancestor, the Zigang True Ancestor, and the Unbroken True Ancestor, were all dumbfounded, as if everything was an illusion.

At this moment, Ye Tian's strength was so terrifying, far beyond the true ancestor's extreme, if they were against Ye Tian, I am afraid that they would be severely injured or even killed in an instant.

Many people didn't know the Supreme True Ancestor, so they didn't know what this meant, but they also knew that the current Xuanxu Ancient Realm could not give birth to a new Dao Ancestor, so they were very surprised why Ye Tian's strength was so terrifying.

At this time, a Dao Ancestor finally couldn't help but exclaim: "Supreme True Ancestor, it's impossible, how can you become a Supreme True Ancestor!!!

Gu Feng Dao Ancestor's expression also changed greatly, and his eyes were full of fear and jealousy.

Supreme True Ancestor, as long as he does not fall, he will almost inevitably become a Ninefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor in the future, and even have a great concept of becoming a Half-Step Domain Ancestor.

Before, he had never heard of the Supreme True Ancestor, and only when he had just become the Sixth Heaven before, did he know about the existence of the Supreme True Ancestor.

Even if he is a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, he is very envious of the Supreme True Ancestor, that is the real peerless genius, the existence of the heavens that dominates the first generation!

It is rumored that the three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace were once Supreme True Ancestors, but they were not qualified to see them.

Today, it was the first time he had seen the Supreme True Ancestor, but he didn't expect it to be an enemy.

"What is the Supreme True Ancestor?"

Many True Ancestors were puzzled, and even the Invincible True Ancestors were confused, not quite understanding what the Supreme True Ancestor meant.

"I didn't expect the Nine Extremes General to become the Supreme True Ancestor!"

The bloody general was surprised.

The Ferris General and the Wind Star General on the side asked suspiciously, "General Blood, do you know what the Supreme True Ancestor is?"

General Bloody said, "I know, I once chatted with Lord Wind King by chance, and I heard about the secret of the Supreme True Ancestor. The Invincible True Ancestor is not the limit, there is also a level of combat power on it, which is the Supreme True Ancestor. The five True Ancestor standards we usually talk about are actually not recognized by the Dao Ancestors, but the Supreme True Ancestors are recognized by the True Ancestors. Only by breaking the shackles of the Invincible True Ancestor's extreme and giving birth to the Supreme Dao Source can one be a Supreme True Ancestor! The Supreme Dao Source of the Supreme True Ancestor can continuously generate the power of the Origin, so the Origin of the Supreme True Ancestor will never be exhausted, and it will be difficult for the Origin to be injured. Moreover, the Supreme True Ancestor was able to cultivate those legendary forbidden techniques, which was as easy as cultivating ordinary exercises! If the Supreme True Ancestor had just broken through, his strength was not very terrifying. But when the Supreme True Ancestor has cultivated the forbidden technique and truly grows up, killing the Invincible True Ancestor is like playing!"

After General Bloody said this, General Ferris and General Fengxing suddenly knew what was going on with the Supreme True Ancestor, and there was a trace of longing in their hearts.

"Don't you want to break through the Supreme True Ancestor, do you think that's what you want? For a long time, so many Heaven Defying Geniuses have tried to attack the Supreme True Ancestor, and even the Nine Heavens forces have tried in vain to cultivate a Supreme True Ancestor, but they have all failed! Attacking the Supreme True Ancestor is too difficult!"

The bloody general sighed.

Once upon a time, he also sent a peak master to invite Ye Tian to become a peak master, but he didn't expect that how long it had passed, Ye Tian had become a supreme true ancestor.

That's right, he is one of the few people who knows that Ye Tian is the Nine Extremes General, but he did not disclose this news, making people from the outside world think that the Nine Extremes General is the Nine Extremes General, and the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, and it is better to have this misunderstanding.

Although he didn't know how Ye Tian managed to have two bodies, he didn't want to explore either.

Now, he didn't dare to investigate.

According to the secret that the Wind King once said, once he becomes a Supreme True Ancestor, he will be a heavenly general of Black Wind Mountain.

"In the future, we will call the Nine Extremes General the Nine Extremes Heavenly General! His status is not below a Heavenly King!"

The bloody general said.

The other side.

Ye Tian fought with the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor, relying on Xiao Cheng's forbidden body, he could ignore part of the damage of the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor, but the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor could not ignore Ye Tian's attack.

With the beginning of the battle, the Ancient Wind Dao Ancestor began to gradually gain the upper hand, because the rules of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm had been suppressing him, constantly injuring him, coupled with Ye Tian's attack, causing his injuries to worsen, and the strength he exerted became weaker and weaker.

If he continued to fight like this, it wouldn't be long before he could beat Ye Tian.

And the other side.

The other Dao Ancestors were also unwilling to waste time and began to dig up other forbidden Dao Stones.

After all, there is not much time for them to come out, and if they delay the time and are suppressed by the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, it will be a big loss!

One Dao Ancestor appeared and directly tore apart the forbidden Dao Stone veins, taking away pieces of ore vein fragments.

In order to snatch these ore vein fragments, the Dao Ancestors also fought wildly.

As for the True Ancestors, they snatched those Forbidden Dao Stones that collapsed, and if they were lucky, they could also snatch a Forbidden Dao Stone, and if they were unlucky, they would be killed directly in battle.

But suddenly.

Unexpected mutation, the core of the forbidden Dao stone vein was cut off, revealing a green aura, attracting the attention of all Dao ancestors.

Even Ye Tian and Gu Feng Dao Ancestor, who were in the middle of the battle, stopped fighting and looked at the crack in the core of the forbidden Dao Stone vein.
